items.headline: McCarthy's slam sails above foul pole as Rockies take home finale

news_items.headline: Yankees’ Spencer Jones caps off tough opening weekend with first big-league knock
news_items.summary: Spencer Jones looked a bit overmatched, striking out four times in his six at-bats Friday and Saturday, but he finally delivered the elusive first knock and RBI early on Sunday.

news_items.headline: White saves the day, robs Muncy at wall with wild catch
Carlos Rodon battles, but walks the ‘bugaboo’ in return to Yankees' rotation
news_items.summary: Yankees lefty Carlos Rodon showed some positives, but was hurt by leadoff walks as he made his season debut on Sunday.

news_items.headline: Mets’ Sean Manaea tosses scoreless inning, sees positive sign as he works to fix glaring struggles
news_items.summary: On a day of few positives for the Mets, a displaced starting pitcher finally took a step forward.

news_items.headline: Royals drop finale 6-3 to Detroit
news_items.summary: A disappointing end to a solid homestand

news_items.headline: Mets prospects A.J. Ewing, Ryan Clifford enjoy big days at the plate with Syracuse
news_items.summary: The Syracuse Mets suffered their third straight loss to the Rochester Red Wings on Sunday, but some of the organizations top young talents enjoyed another big day.

news_items.headline: Mets’ David Peterson ‘getting back to who I am’ with promising relief outing
news_items.summary: David Peterson received no love from his defense, particularly third baseman Andy Ibáñez, but he did his part to give the Mets an opportunity to win Sunday.

news_items.headline: Mets close road trip 5-4 after another poor offensive showing: 'We're better than that'
news_items.summary: After winning four of six to open the road trip and the month of May, the Mets have now lost three of their last four and have scored just seven runs over that span.

news_items.headline: Tigers 6, Royals 3: The kids are alright, again
news_items.summary: A bullpen day went well, and Matt Vierling and the kids powered the Tigers over the Royals.
